properties.titulo_evento: US and Iran exchange fire as Trump says war will ‘be over quickly’
properties.descricao: U.S. forces launched retaliatory strikes against Iranian military facilities Thursday after Iran fired missiles and drones at three U.S. Navy vessels.

properties.titulo_evento: A small town in Germany braces for end to decades of life with US troops

properties.titulo_evento: Dueling Victory Day ceasefires for war in Ukraine collapse almost immediately
properties.descricao: Both sides had proclaimed a ceasefire surrounding the important celebration marking the Soviet Union’s contribution to victory over Nazi Germany.

properties.titulo_evento: US forces fire at, disable Iran-flagged tanker trying to evade blockade
properties.descricao: While President Trump said Project Freedom was paused, the U.S. Navy blockade continues to ban vessels from entering and exiting Iranian ports.

properties.titulo_evento: France moves aircraft carrier to Red Sea with eye on Hormuz mission
properties.descricao: France on Wednesday deployed its carrier strike group to the Red Sea as part of planning for a potential mission to secure the Strait of Hormuz.

properties.titulo_evento: France moves carrier into Red Sea ahead of potential Hormuz mission
properties.descricao: President Emmanuel Macron has said any multinational initiative to secure the strait would only happen once the hottest phase of the conflict subsides.

properties.titulo_evento: Pakistan’s first Chinese submarine set to boost naval capability

properties.titulo_evento: Oil prices jump as US, Iran trade fire in Strait of Hormuz
properties.descricao: Brent crude rises amid clashes in critical waterway.

properties.titulo_evento: Iran war live: Trump says ceasefire still ‘in effect’ as Iran, US clash
properties.descricao: Iran accuses the US of violating the ceasefire by targeting Iranian vessels and carrying out strikes on coastal areas.

properties.titulo_evento: Iran says it attacked US Navy ships after they targeted Iranian tanker
properties.descricao: US military says it intercepted and responded to 'unprovoked' Iranian attack, stressing that it doesn't seek escalation.

properties.titulo_evento: Senators press US military on Israel’s displacement campaign in Lebanon
properties.descricao: In letter to CENTCOM commander, 12 Democrats raise questions about possible US role in Israel's 'mass evacuation zones'.

properties.titulo_evento: Palestinian boy mourns father killed in Israeli strike on security post
properties.descricao: A Palestinian boy mourns his father, one of three people killed in an Israeli strike on a security post in Gaza.

properties.titulo_evento: US issues new Cuba sanctions as UN experts warn of ‘energy starvation’
properties.descricao: Latest sanctions target military-controlled conglomerate, come as effective US fuel blockade continues.

properties.titulo_evento: Gulf states urge UN action to ensure Strait of Hormuz safety
properties.descricao: Draft resolution demands Iran halt attacks, pin-point mines and ensure passage of humanitarian aid through strait.

properties.titulo_evento: Can China help end the Iran war?
properties.descricao: Chinese and Iranian foreign ministers meet while a tense ceasefire holds.

properties.titulo_evento: Trump says US-Iran ceasefire still in place after exchange of fire in Strait of Hormuz
properties.descricao: Iran accuses the US of violating the truce, alleging it targeted an oil tanker and carried out attacks on coastal areas.

properties.titulo_evento: Trump's 'irresponsible war' to blame for economic slowdown, German minister says
properties.descricao: Finance Minister Lars Klingbeil blamed the US president's "irresponsible war in Iran" for harming the Germany economy.

properties.titulo_evento: Rosenberg: Russia's Victory Day parade with no tanks a sign Ukraine war not going to plan
properties.descricao: For the first time in nearly two decades, there will be no military hardware, just soldiers during Saturday's parade in Moscow.

properties.titulo_evento: From oil giants to banks - these companies are making billions from Iran war
properties.descricao: Through surging profits or soaring share prices, the war has been a boon for some firms.

properties.titulo_evento: World Cup fans in China and India face broadcast uncertainty
properties.descricao: Broadcasters in the two countries have yet to reach deals with Fifa, just weeks before the tournament is due to start.

properties.titulo_evento: Fears of renewed Gaza war as Hamas disarmament talks stall
properties.descricao: Israeli media reports suggest Israel is preparing to resume fighting because of the impasse in talks with Hamas.

properties.titulo_evento: China announces suspended death sentences for former defence ministers
properties.descricao: The announcement follows recent ousting of several top officials in China's military.

properties.titulo_evento: Disturbances and 127 arrests mar Paris party after PSG Champions League victory
properties.descricao: Fans took to the streets to celebrate the Paris team's qualification for the final, but celebrations were marred by disturbances.

properties.titulo_evento: US and Iran exchange fire in Strait of Hormuz, Trump says ceasefire holds
properties.descricao: The US military said it struck Iranian targets in self-defence but that it does not seek escalation. Iran said it launched missiles at "enemy" forces in the waterway after a claimed US attack on an oil tanker, and reported shooting down several drone...

properties.titulo_evento: UK to summon Chinese ambassador after convictions over spying on Hong Kong dissidents
properties.descricao: The two men were found to have carried out intel gathering missions on political dissidents residing in the UK wanted by Chinese authorities. One witness reported the pair threatened to arrest him on foreign soil due to his continued opposition.

properties.titulo_evento: US underlines 'strong relationship' with Vatican as Rubio meets pope after Trump criticism
properties.descricao: Rubio's visit comes after US President Trump accused the pope of being "weak on crime and terrible for foreign policy" after he made critical comments about the Iran war.

properties.titulo_evento: Middle East war will slow down economic growth in Africa as cost of living crisis soars, IMF warns
properties.descricao: According to the IMF's report, regional growth is expected to decline by 0.3 percentage points, and some 20 million people in Africa now face the risk of food insecurity as the Iran war raises energy and food prices.

properties.titulo_evento: Russia strikes Kharkiv residential district as drone attacks escalate
properties.descricao: A major Russian drone offensive struck Kharkiv’s Novobavarskyi district and other cities, injuring civilians and destroying homes despite Ukraine’s strong air defence.

properties.titulo_evento: Iranians at home divided between hope for regime change and war fears
properties.descricao: People in Iran who spoke to Euronews said they were torn between hope for regime change and fear of devastation, while reflecting on US-Israeli strikes, rising hardship and fading support for war.

properties.titulo_evento: Injury row, Sardinia trip, petition - Kylian Mbappé faces growing backlash from Real Madrid fans
properties.descricao: Injured Real Madrid striker Kylian Mbappé has sparked backlash from some fans after taking a holiday in Sardinia ahead of Sunday’s Clasico against Barcelona.

properties.titulo_evento: Israel strikes Beirut for first time since ceasefire, reportedly killing Hezbollah commander
properties.descricao: Beirut and its southern suburbs had been spared Israeli attacks since 8 April, when massive Israeli strikes across the country killed more than 350 people.

properties.titulo_evento: Local elections across UK test Starmer as Reform UK eyes major gains
properties.descricao: UK voters began casting ballots on Thursday, 7 May, in local and devolved elections seen as the biggest political test yet for Prime Minister Keir Starmer since Labour’s landslide victory in July 2024.

properties.titulo_evento: Israel army investigating after soldier seen desecrating Virgin Mary statue in Lebanon
properties.descricao: The Israeli military said on Thursday it "respects freedom of religion and worship, as well as holy sites and religious symbols of all religions and communities."

properties.titulo_evento: North Korea not bound by nuclear non-proliferation treaty, UN envoy says
properties.descricao: North Korea has insisted that it will not give up its nuclear arsenal, describing its path as "irreversible" and vowing to strengthen its capabilities.

properties.titulo_evento: Iran reviewing US proposal on deal to end war as Trump ramps up pressure
properties.descricao: A fragile ceasefire between the US and Iran has largely held since 8 April but in-person talks between the two countries hosted by Pakistan last month failed to reach an agreement.

properties.titulo_evento: Champions League: PSG beat Bayern 6-5 on aggregate to reach final against Arsenal
properties.descricao: Paris Saint-Germain advanced to the Champions League final after holding Bayern Munich to a 1-1 draw and securing a 6-5 aggregate victory.

properties.titulo_evento: ’Ukraine will respond in kind’, Zelenskyy says after Russia breaks Kyiv’s ceasefire
properties.descricao: Ukraine will decide its course of action towards Russia’s Victory Day parade “depending on the situation tonight and tomorrow”, Zelenskyy said, sending a warning to Moscow that Kyiv will “will respond in kind” to Russian attacks.

properties.titulo_evento: Eurovision hopes 70th anniversary celebration outshines Israel controversy
properties.descricao: The Eurovision song contest turns 70 this year, but the celebration threatens to be overshadowed by the competition’s biggest ever boycott over the continued inclusion of Israel.

properties.titulo_evento: US military says it intercepted Iranian attacks in Strait of Hormuz
properties.descricao: On Thursday, the US and Iran exchanged accusations and fire in the Strait of Hormuz, with Washington saying it intercepted Iranian attacks and struck back at military targets, while Tehran reported retaliatory action and rising regional tensions. Th...

properties.titulo_evento: Zelenskyy warns Russia's friends against attending parade
properties.descricao: Zelenskyy said he did "not recommend" that representatives of states allied with Russia attend the May 9 parade. Russian authorities also said they were concerned about possible Ukrainian attacks.

properties.titulo_evento: US says it struck targets in Iran after attack on warships
properties.descricao: The US military said it targeted Iranian military facilities after Iran attacked three US destroyers transiting the Strait of Hormuz. President Donald Trump called the US strikes against Iran a "love tap."

properties.titulo_evento: Is Russian oil becoming a lifeline for Southeast Asia?
properties.descricao: With oil, gas and fertilizer imports squeezed by the Iran war, Southeast Asian governments are brushing off EU pressure and treating Russian energy as a tool of economic survival.

properties.titulo_evento: Marco Rubio meets Pope Leo at the Vatican
properties.descricao: The visit by the US secretary of state to the Vatican comes as President Donald Trump continues to disparage the Catholic leader over criticism of the Iran war.

properties.titulo_evento: 'The threat is real.' Why the EU is treating Chinese solar tech like a security threat.
properties.descricao: Europe's solar boom is powered by Chinese technology. But experts warn Chinese-made tech could threaten the continent's safety and even create blackouts. Now, Brussels is moving to reduce its dependence.

properties.titulo_evento: UK votes in key local and regional elections
properties.descricao: Prime Minister Keir Starmer's Labour Party is expected to face major losses, perhaps spelling the end of his premiership. Reform, the Greens, Plaid Cymru and the SNP are all hoping to make gains.

properties.titulo_evento: Bayern Munich exit Champions League in semifinal to PSG
properties.descricao: Holders Paris Saint-Germain are one game away from retaining the Champions League after knocking out German champions Bayern Munich. Bayern can still complete the domestic double but again miss out on the big one.

properties.titulo_evento: Germany cracks down on neo-Nazi networks
properties.descricao: Police and prosecutors have launched a nationwide crackdown on young right-wing extremists. They are alleged to have formed criminal organizations and attacked members of the left-wing scene.

properties.titulo_evento: UK elections 2026: Heavy Labour losses as Farage makes gains — live updates
properties.descricao: Follow the key results and fallout live as elections in Scotland, Wales and vast swathes of England offer a major test of the embattled Keir Starmer's authority.

properties.titulo_evento: Greece bets big on MAGA, as other EU countries turn away from Trump
properties.descricao: While the U.S. president's relations with other European countries sour, he is hailing Greece as "terrific"

properties.titulo_evento: Trump to test limits of dealmaking in Beijing
properties.descricao: The wrangling over a business delegation for next week's summit in Beijing is just one sign of the delicate balancing act the administration is trying to strike on the commercial relationship between the economic rivals.

properties.titulo_evento: US and Iran launch attacks amid tenuous ceasefire
properties.descricao: The U.S. said it was responding to Iranian forces attacking Navy ships in the Strait of Hormuz.

properties.descricao: Oil prices rose after the United States attacked Iranian military sites in retaliation for Iran firing on U.S. warships in the Strait of Hormuz

properties.titulo_evento: Why Stocks and Bonds Are Responding Differently to the Iran War
properties.descricao: Stock investors are betting that companies will make enormous profits, despite the war. But investors in bonds, including U.S. Treasuries, have other concerns.

properties.descricao: The oil giant’s earnings in the first three months of the year were more than double the previous quarter’s and follow similarly strong results of European rivals.

properties.descricao: Investors waited for news on the situation in the Middle East, as the U.S. and Iran gave mixed signals on peace negotiations.

properties.titulo_evento: War and Energy Shortages Boost China’s Influence in Asia
properties.descricao: The war in Iran has left China’s neighbors appealing for help, handing Beijing the kind of sway it has long sought.
